历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5972 → 3647 → 3595 → 4618 → 3617 respectively. In 2022, there was a significant forward shift, followed by a notable backward shift in 2024, and a rebound to 3617 in 2025, showing an overall fluctuating forward trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 3617. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 128 in 2021, 117 in 2022, 124 in 2023, 128 in 2024, and 134 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 146, an increase of 12 (+9.0%) compared to 2025, slightly larger than the provincial Physics Category candidate growth rate (8.4%), leading to a slight easing of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 13th, firmly in the national Top 15, with an extremely high school level that continues to strongly attract candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (11 cases, 7 negative), which may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent. Douyin popularity ranks 29th overall (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-medium level and moderate attention. From 2022 to 2023, there were signals of a cutoff line drop, but by 2025, the evaluation has turned to a relatively positive one, and the application psychology has stabilized. 5. [Advantage Disciplines] Sun Yat-sen University has 23 disciplines rated A- or above, including Business Administration and Ecology as A+, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Pharmacy, and Marxist Theory as A, and Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and Computer Science and Technology as A-, with top-tier disciplinary strength that strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science (highly recommended but cooling down), Clinical Medicine (recommended), Stomatology (recommended), and Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended and heating up) are among Sun Yat-sen University's advantageous majors with consistently high popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in this province is approximately 347,000, an increase of 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Sun Yat-sen University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, adjacent to Hunan Province, with convenient transportation and strong regional preference. The university's enrollment plan in Hunan accounts for a relatively high proportion, with 146 spots in the 2026 Physics Category, providing many opportunities for candidates from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3617, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 12 (+9.0%) slightly larger than the candidate growth rate (+8.4%), the top-tier school level but somewhat negative reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 3791, with a range of 3412–4170.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3412–4170, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Software Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Mathematics, Clinical Medicine (Guangzhou), etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology 5+3, Computer Science) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Mechanical Engineering, Aerospace, Biotechnology, etc.) as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 3412), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 551, 553, 456, 516, and 651 respectively. In 2023, the ranking moved significantly forward, but from 2024 to 2025 it continued to move backward. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 651, with a cumulative backward movement of about 195 positions over the past two years, showing a backward trend. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 45 in 2021, 45 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 29 in 2025, showing an overall reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 25, a reduction of 4 (-13.8%) compared to 2025, with the reduction rate far smaller than the increase in provincial History Category examinees (+31.2%), significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sun Yat-sen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 13th, firmly in the national Top 15. The school level is extremely high, strongly attracting liberal arts examinees. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may suppress application enthusiasm to some extent. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 29th (relatively hot), with moderate attention. From 2022 to 2023, there were signals of a cutoff score gap, but by 2025 it had turned to a somewhat positive evaluation. Sun Yat-sen University has outstanding advantages in liberal arts, with Business Administration rated A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Philosophy A-, Law A-, Sociology A-, and Foreign Language and Literature A-, strongly attracting History Category examinees.

专业热度与地域.text:
The popularity of majors in Sun Yat-sen University's History Category enrollment is clearly polarized: Law (recommended but differentiated), Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese (recommended), Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged), and Business Administration (clearly discouraged). In 2026, the number of provincial History Category examinees is approximately 187,000, a significant increase of 31.2% from 142,500 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the dual pressure of the 2025 baseline ranking of 651, a reduction of 4 students (-13.8%) in 2026, and a 31.2% increase in History Category examinees, along with the top school level but somewhat negative reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 627, with a range of 564 to 690.
